name: WORLD KINECT CORP
summary: World Kinect Corporation is a global energy management company incorporated in Florida in 1984. It provides fuel fulfillment and related services across aviation, marine, and land transportation sectors. Services include fuel management, ground handling, dispatch, trip support, price risk management, and sustainability products. It also supplies natural gas and is expanding into sustainable aviation fuel and lower-carbon alternatives for maritime customers.

products.name: Aviation Fuel Supply
products.description: Global aviation fuel supply and delivery to airlines, cargo carriers, corporate fleets, and government/military customers.

products.name: Fuel Management Services
products.description: Fuel procurement management including cost control, quality control, and claims management for aviation and marine customers.

products.name: Ground Handling and Trip Support
products.description: 24/7 global dispatch, flight planning, scheduling, and ground handling services for aviation customers.

products.name: Marine Fuel and Lubricants
products.description: Marketing of fuel, lubricants, and related products to container, bulk, tanker fleets, cruise lines, and governments.

products.name: Land Fuel Distribution
products.description: Liquid fuels, natural gas, and related products sold to commercial, industrial, and government customers via cardlock network.

products.name: Price Risk Management
products.description: Fuel cost control offerings using price risk management tools for marine and aviation customers.

products.name: Sustainable Aviation Fuel
products.description: Expanding supply chain for renewable and lower-carbon aviation fuels to meet customer demand.

products.name: Natural Gas Supply
products.description: Supply of natural gas to commercial, industrial, and government customers primarily in North America.

products.name: Sustainability Products and Services
products.description: Complementary sustainability-related products and advisory services offered alongside core energy products.
